positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for picuris_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u36,axiom,
    ~mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,texas)).

cnf(u40,axiom,
    located_in(harding_pegmatite_mine,picuris_mountains)).

cnf(u44,axiom,
    ~located_in(harding_pegmatite_mine,texas)).

cnf(u52,axiom,
    mountain_range_in(picuris_mountains,new_mexico)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~mountain_range_in(X0,texas) | ~has_donated_mine(X0)).

cnf(u28,negated_conjecture,
    located_in(harding_pegmatite_mine,new_mexico)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define visited_by(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define donated(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
